titles.title: Don’t Lose Your Vision of Jesus

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We have heard all the Thunders Which are sounding so clear; And we we’ve seen our Lord in the Word. But our lives now are telling the story so true; Have we really caught a vision of Him.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Don’t lose your vision of Jesus; Keep your eyes ever on Him, We have all come too far now We’re almost home So let’s not lose our vision of Him.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We’ve seen many who have started And fell by the way; But God’s Elected are making the climb We can’t afford to look at others And start following them; If we do we'll lose our vision of Him.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Now the Predestinated are living the Word They are hated and rejected of men; But they have caught a revelation, It’s manifesting through them, And they'll not lose their vision of Him.
